data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: YouTube has measures in place to mitigate Distributed Denial of Service attacks.

data.title: OAuth 2.0 Authentication
data.description: Ensures secure API access and user authentication using OAuth 2.0 mechanism.

data.title: Content Moderation AI
data.description: Automated systems to detect and handle inappropriate content.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: End-to-end encryption to protect video data and user information.

data.title: Security Audits & Bug Bounty
data.description: Regular security audits and a bug bounty program to discover vulnerabilities.
